name: My doctor says my lung issues are from years of factory dust in Ogden, is this a work-related illness I can claim?
description: Yes, if medical evidence proves work caused it; get specialist report.[2]

mainEntity.name: My doctor says my lung issues are from years of factory dust in Ogden, is this a work-related illness I can claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if medical evidence proves work caused it; get specialist report.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, occupational diseases like lung conditions from prolonged work exposure qualify for workers comp if proven work-related.[2] Utah covers illnesses from job duties, not pre-existing or off-duty issues.[1][2] Key factors: Medical expert opinion linking exposure to illness, employment duration, no other causes. Gather work history, exposure records, and specialist diagnosis. Consult a Utah workers comp lawyer to build causation evidence before filing.
